/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/zeropoint_sdl.dir/zeropoint_sdl_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/zeropoint_sdl.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o bin/zeropoint_sdl.app/Contents/MacOS/zeropoint_sdl   -L/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.8/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.8/lib libzeropoint_core.a /usr/local/Cellar/sdl2/2.32.8/lib/libSDL2.dylib
